notes: Cache bump only. Forces the service worker to re-fetch index.html / landing.html / dct-ios.html so the v1.6.64 landing redesign (the V1.7.3 front door with the power-topology panel and status chips) actually reaches installed PWAs and returning browsers that were still serving the previously cached landing. No layout, logic, or routing changes. Three stamps aligned at v1.6.65 (dct-ios.html PHANTOM_APP_VERSION, sw.js CACHE_VERSION, version.json).
